leadText: Luster Purge (Japanese: ラスターパージ Luster Purge) is a damage-dealing Psychic-type move introduced in Generation III. It is the signature move of Latios.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generations III to VIII 1.2 Generation VIII 1.2.1 Pokémon Sword and Shield 1.3 Generation IX Effect [ edit | edit source ] Luster Purge inflicts damage and has a 50% chance of lowering the target's Special Defense stat by one stage. Luster Purge can be used as the second move of a Pokémon Contest combination , with the user gaining 2 bonus appeal points if Calm Mind was used in the previous turn. Generations III to VIII [ edit | edit source ] Luster Purge has a base power of 70. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Sword and Shield [ edit | edit source ] In Versions 1.0 to 1.2.1 of Pokémon Sword and Shield , Luster Purge could not be selected in a battle. Starting with Version 1.3.0, it is usable and functions the same as it did in previous generations. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] In Versions 1.0 to 2.0.2 of Pokémon Scarlet and Violet , Luster Purge could not be selected in a battle. Starting with Version 3.0.0, it is usable and functions the same as it did in previous generations. Furthermore, Luster Purge's base power has been increased to 95.

sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Colo XD Attacks with a burst of light. May lower Sp. Def . FR LG A burst of light injures the foe. It may also lower the foe's Sp. Def . D P Pt HG SS PBR The user looses a damaging burst of light. It may also reduce the target's Sp. Def stat. B W B2 W2 The user lets loose a damaging burst of light. It may also reduce the target's Sp. Def stat. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The user lets loose a damaging burst of light. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat. ZA The user attacks by unleashing a blinding light. This may also lower targets' Sp. Def stats.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Inflicts damage on the target. It may also lower the target's Special Defense by one level. MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target. It may also reduce the target's Special Defense by 1 level. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる しかも いっていのかくりつで とくぼうを １だんかいさげる MD GtI UNUSED S MD MD RT DX It damages nearby enemies. It could also lower their Sp. Def.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Although Luster Purge wasn't used in the animated series until close to the end of Pokémon the Series: Diamond and Pearl , it was first mentioned by Jessie in All Things Bright and Beautifly! , close to the beginning of Pokémon the Series: Ruby and Sapphire .
